Right now, more than anything, I need to talk things out with the Village Chief...
I'm worried about Elly... I should head home first.

イベントID(もしくは名称) = Forbbiden_Enter

...The village chief betrayed us. To think he was looking at us like that... ...We
need to leave the village as soon as possible.
↑North Forest There is a monster ruin deep in the forest, do not enter

This mixed bathing here, when you think about it, is strange... The villagers
probably made it because they wanted to meet Elly in the bath... All the residents of
this village think about nothing but satisfying their sexual desires...

Even the regular old men at the bar were trying to take advantage of Elly... I
thought they were good people, even if they were mean drunks...

...Did Dario foresee this happening and keep rushing Elly into sex like that...? That
was more important than tilling this field...

This is the training scarecrow I've been hitting since I was a kid. Hmm, seeing it
again after so long, it looks really small... If I swung my sword at it now, it would
definitely break...
I don't have time for training. I have to save Elly as soon as possible...

Hmm, \n[1]? What's wrong, you're in such a hurry... The village chief should be at home
right now.

Did you finish talking with the chief? ...I don't know what you're so angry about,
but... don't think too badly of the chief, okay? He's a fine leader of the village!
...\n[1]-kun? You look pale, are you okay? You should go home and rest soon...
